{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113123155AA93424EF0C26A30E3"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566047796446200638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"让读者看到不一样的历史故事！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761612227,"group_id":"7561463818027535384","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+0uwWfz2Y7ImeHT2oRf8KT6uDZLr+If/YNphpoQglJl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2137048742109070","user_name":"吉澳的慕千汐汐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2137048742109070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7561463818027535384","book_info":{"abstract":"本书以鲜活的叙事风格，还原清朝入关后首位皇帝福临的短暂一生。6 岁登基的他，是多尔衮摄政下的傀儡君主，在盛京与紫禁的权力漩涡中，默默积蓄亲政力量；14 岁亲政后，他力推 “以汉治汉”，重用汉臣、修订律法、尝试 “摊丁入亩”，却屡屡被满族保守势力阻挠，在改革与妥协中挣扎。
情感上，他挣脱蒙古联姻的枷锁，与董鄂氏谱写帝王少有的炽烈爱情 —— 一月连晋其为皇贵妃，为她废后、为她大赦天下，却又因皇子夭折、爱妃病逝，陷入生死之痛，转而沉迷佛教，甚至两度欲剃发出家。
24 岁时，天花夺走他的生命，临终前的 “罪己诏” 藏着多少无奈？遗体火化、与爱妃骨灰合葬的遗愿，又藏着多少对皇权的叛逆？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/588e383c0bd04001998f15a0a2a7d503","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7561463818027535384","book_name":"少年天子：顺治皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c050","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1026人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7561464603633254936","read_count":"1026","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"311042"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"108","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,皇帝,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of484cafc0fbb4695868a3d66ab42f368~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253951&x-signature=SIeSCw7Fp5n63eYO%2BdXsWDJIVdI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108952275312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113123155AA93424EF0C26A30E3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4238,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8323,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1154},"user_action":{"author":0
